title: Scoville NEVERSTICK 16cm Saucepan with Lid, Small Non Stick Saucepan, 1.1L Capacity, Easy to Grip Handle, PFOA Free, Dishwasher Safe, Suitable for All Hobs Including Induction, Aluminium, Black
features: 16CM SAUCEPAN WITH LID: Upgrade your everyday cooking with this versatile Scoville Neverstick saucepan — ideal for simmering sauces, boiling eggs, and preparing individual portions with ease. With a 1.1L capacity, it's crafted from high-quality, toughened aluminium for greater durability than traditional cookware. The included tempered glass lid helps prevent spills, regulate heat, and maintain a steady simmer — perfect for everyday use.

SUPER STRONG NON-STICK: Featuring Scoville’s renowned Neverstick technology, laboratory-tested to be 5X stronger than other non-sticks. Enjoy hassle-free cooking with no oil or butter required—perfect for healthier meals and effortless food release. Neverstick is flake, peel, and PFOA-free for a safer cooking experience.
EASY TO CLEAN: Dishwasher safe for quick and convenient cleanup. For long-lasting non-stick performance, hand washing is recommended.

SUITABLE FOR ALL HOBS: Designed for all home kitchens, this pan features a durable stainless steel base that delivers efficient heat conduction to help save time and energy. Compatible with all hob types, including gas, electric, ceramic, and induction.

LIFETIME GUARANTEE: Scoville offers a lifetime guarantee with this product, covering any manufacturing defects or material issues under normal household use. For care instructions, guarantee registration, and more details, please visit Scoville’s website.
